shakshi: The player executed the attack on Sophia — the weapon fired
The weapon wounded Sophia — it works on beings like her. She survived. The test was a partial result.
Nexiott now has field data on the plasma weapon against a living ancient target — the program advanced
Nexiott got what he actually wanted — the assassination attempt was the data collection
Sophia sicced Lectura on the player — the sea responds through its own representative
Lectura met — Undine, Sophia's instrument of response, chased the player off
Sophia knows the player was involved — the passage she gave them was used against her
Ocean passage to Mercurie closed — the sea itself closes against a player who weaponized it
Sophia's trust is broken — reversible if the relationship can be repaired
